Content:
# InstagramToMealie A simple little converter, that imports an instagram URL into mealie

INSTAGRAM TO MEALIE


## Table of Contents - [Overview](#overview) - [Getting Started](#getting-started) - [Prerequisites](#prerequisites) - [Installation](#installation) - [Usage](#usage) - [Configuration](#configuration) - [Contributing](#contributing) - [License](#license) - [Acknowledgments](#acknowledgments) --- ## Overview With InstagramToMealie, you can simply input an Instagram post URL. The project seamlessly integrates with the Mealie API to create a new recipe with an associated image or video assets. --- ## Getting Started
Translation:
# InstagramToMealie 一个简单的小转换器，可以将Instagram链接导入到Mealie中

INSTAGRAM TO MEALIE


## 目录 - [概述](#overview) - [快速开始](#getting-started) - [先决条件](#prerequisites) - [安装](#installation) - [使用方法](#usage) - [配置](#configuration) - [贡献](#contributing) - [许可证](#license) - [致谢](#acknowledgments) --- ## 概述 使用InstagramToMealie，您只需输入Instagram帖子链接。该项目无缝集成Mealie API， 创建一个新的食谱，并附带相关的图片或视频资源。 --- ## 快速开始

RowTranslations.originContent: A simple little converter, that imports an instagram URL into mealie
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 一个简单的小转换器，可以将Instagram链接导入到Mealie中

RowTranslations.originContent: With InstagramToMealie, you can simply input an Instagram post URL. The project seamlessly integrates with the Mealie API to
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 使用InstagramToMealie，您只需输入Instagram帖子链接。该项目无缝集成Mealie API，

RowTranslations.originContent: create a new recipe with an associated image or video assets.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 创建一个新的食谱，并附带相关的图片或视频资源。

Content:
### Prerequisites

1. Make sure you have OpenAI / Ollama configured in Mealie by navigating to `/admin/debug/openai` on your Mealie instance. This project doesn't integrate directly with OpenAI / Ollama, but needs it to be configured in Mealie to work properly. I personally got the best results with `qwen2.5:7b` as the Ollama Model.
2. Generate a Mealie API Key (`/user/profile/api-tokens`). [Mealie Docs](https://docs.mealie.io/documentation/getting-started/api-usage/)
3. Generate a Instagram Session File (!thats the most tricky step). A [helper script](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoTec2002/InstagramToMealie/refs/heads/main/helpers/instaloader_login_helper.py) is provided in this repo! It's just
   copied from the [Instaloader Docs](https://instaloader.github.io/troubleshooting.html).
    1. Download the script: [https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoTec2002/InstagramToMealie/refs/heads/main/helpers/instaloader_login_helper.py](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoTec2002/InstagramToMealie/refs/heads/main/helpers/instaloader_login_helper.py)
    2. Login to Instagram in Firefox
    3. Execute the snippet: `python ./instaloader_login_helper.py`
    4. Copy the file that was generated by the script to a known location. This file will later be mounted to the Docker container. It can be generated on a different system and than copied to the target system.

### Installation

Install InstagramToMealie using one of the following methods:

**Build from source:**
<details closed>

1. Clone the InstagramToMealie repository:
Translation:
### 前提条件

1. 确保你已在 Mealie 中配置了 OpenAI / Ollama，方法是在你的 Mealie 实例中访问 `/admin/debug/openai`。该项目不直接集成 OpenAI / Ollama，但需要在 Mealie 中配置它才能正常工作。我个人使用 Ollama 模型 `qwen2.5:7b` 得到了最佳效果。
2. 生成一个 Mealie API 密钥（`/user/profile/api-tokens`）。[Mealie 文档](https://docs.mealie.io/documentation/getting-started/api-usage/)
3. 生成一个 Instagram 会话文件（这是最棘手的步骤）。本仓库提供了一个[辅助脚本](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoTec2002/InstagramToMealie/refs/heads/main/helpers/instaloader_login_helper.py)！它只是从[Instaloader 文档](https://instaloader.github.io/troubleshooting.html)复制过来的。
    1. 下载脚本：[https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoTec2002/InstagramToMealie/refs/heads/main/helpers/instaloader_login_helper.py](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoTec2002/InstagramToMealie/refs/heads/main/helpers/instaloader_login_helper.py)
    2. 在 Firefox 中登录 Instagram
    3. 执行命令：`python ./instaloader_login_helper.py`
    4. 将脚本生成的文件复制到已知位置。此文件稍后会挂载到 Docker 容器中。它可以在另一台系统上生成，然后复制到目标系统。

### 安装

使用以下方法之一安装 InstagramToMealie：

**从源码构建：**
<details closed>

1. 克隆 InstagramToMealie 仓库：

This project doesn't integrate directly with OpenAI / Ollama, but needs it to be configured in Mealie to work properly. I personally got the best results with `qwen2.5:7b` as the Ollama Model.

2. 生成一个 Mealie API 密钥（`/user/profile/api-tokens`）。[Mealie 文档](https://docs.mealie.io/documentation/getting-started/api-usage/)

RowTranslations.originContent: 3. Generate a Instagram Session File (!thats the most tricky step). A [helper script](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoTec2002/InstagramToMealie/refs/heads/main/helpers/instaloader_login_helper.py) is provided in this repo! It's just
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 3. 生成一个 Instagram 会话文件（这是最棘手的步骤）。本仓库提供了一个[辅助脚本](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoTec2002/InstagramToMealie/refs/heads/main/helpers/instaloader_login_helper.py)！它只是从[Instaloader 文档](https://instaloader.github.io/troubleshooting.html)复制过来的。
2. 在 Firefox 中登录 Instagram
4. 将脚本生成的文件复制到已知位置。此文件稍后会挂载到 Docker 容器中。它可以在另一台系统上生成，然后复制到目标系统。

Content:
</details>

**Use the provided Docker image at [jotec2002/instagramtomealie](https://hub.docker.com/repository/docker/jotec2002/instagramtomealie/general)**

Deploy it via Docker Compose alongside your Mealie installation

Example `compose.yaml` file using a session file to authenticate:
Translation:
</details>

**使用提供的 Docker 镜像 [jotec2002/instagramtomealie](https://hub.docker.com/repository/docker/jotec2002/instagramtomealie/general)**

通过 Docker Compose 与您的 Mealie 安装一起部署

使用会话文件进行身份验证的示例 `compose.yaml` 文件：

RowTranslations.originContent: Deploy it via Docker Compose alongside your Mealie installation
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 通过 Docker Compose 与您的 Mealie 安装一起部署

RowTranslations.originContent: Example `compose.yaml` file using a session file to authenticate:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 使用会话文件进行身份验证的示例 `compose.yaml` 文件：

Content:
```yaml
services:
  mealie:
    image: ghcr.io/mealie-recipes/mealie:v2.1.0
    container_name: mealie
    #Look up in the Mealie Docs for how to use Mealie
  InstagramToMealie:
    image: jotec2002/instagramtomealie
    ports:
      - 9001:9001
    environment:
      INSTA_USER: "instagram username"
      MEALIE_API_KEY: "MEALIE API KEY"
      MEALIE_URL: "YOU LOCAL MEALIE INSTALLATION" # e.g http://mealie:9000
      MEALIE_OPENAI_REQUEST_TIMEOUT: 60           # Optional, default: 60
    volumes:
      - ./session-file:/app/session-file        # The Instagram session file you created in the Prerequisites
    depends_on:
      mealie:
        condition: service_healthy
```
Translation:
```yaml
services:
  mealie:
    image: ghcr.io/mealie-recipes/mealie:v2.1.0
    container_name: mealie
    #Look up in the Mealie Docs for how to use Mealie
  InstagramToMealie:
    image: jotec2002/instagramtomealie
    ports:
      - 9001:9001
    environment:
      INSTA_USER: "instagram username"
      MEALIE_API_KEY: "MEALIE API KEY"
      MEALIE_URL: "YOU LOCAL MEALIE INSTALLATION" # e.g http://mealie:9000
      MEALIE_OPENAI_REQUEST_TIMEOUT: 60           # Optional, default: 60
    volumes:
      - ./session-file:/app/session-file        # The Instagram session file you created in the Prerequisites
    depends_on:
      mealie:
        condition: service_healthy
```

RowTranslations.originContent: #Look up in the Mealie Docs for how to use Mealie
RowTranslations.translatedContent: #Look up in the Mealie Docs for how to use Mealie

RowTranslations.originContent: MEALIE_URL: "YOU LOCAL MEALIE INSTALLATION" # e.g http://mealie:9000
RowTranslations.translatedContent: MEALIE_URL: "YOU LOCAL MEALIE INSTALLATION" # e.g http://mealie:9000

RowTranslations.originContent: - ./session-file:/app/session-file        # The Instagram session file you created in the Prerequisites
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - ./session-file:/app/session-file        # The Instagram session file you created in the Prerequisites

Content:
Example `compose.yaml` file using a username & password environment variables to authenticate:

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Two-factor authentication (TFA/TOTP) needs to be disabled on the account in order for this method to work.**
> You will probably need multiple attempts to get this to work. Log in on other systems / IPs in parallel to not trip the Instagram bot detection.
> This is not the recommended way to set up InstagramToMealie.
Translation:
使用用户名和密码环境变量进行身份验证的示例 `compose.yaml` 文件：

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **为了使此方法有效，必须在账户上禁用两因素认证（TFA/TOTP）。**
> 您可能需要多次尝试才能成功。请在其他系统/IP上同时登录，以避免触发Instagram的机器人检测。
> 这不是设置InstagramToMealie的推荐方式。

RowTranslations.originContent: Example `compose.yaml` file using a username & password environment variables to authenticate:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 使用用户名和密码环境变量进行身份验证的示例 `compose.yaml` 文件：

RowTranslations.originContent: > **Two-factor authentication (TFA/TOTP) needs to be disabled on the account in order for this method to work.**
RowTranslations.translatedContent: > **为了使此方法有效，必须在账户上禁用两因素认证（TFA/TOTP）。**

RowTranslations.originContent: > You will probably need multiple attempts to get this to work. Log in on other systems / IPs in parallel to not trip the Instagram bot detection.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: > 您可能需要多次尝试才能成功。请在其他系统/IP上同时登录，以避免触发Instagram的机器人检测。

RowTranslations.originContent: > This is not the recommended way to set up InstagramToMealie.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: > 这不是设置InstagramToMealie的推荐方式。

Content:
```yaml
services:
  mealie:
    image: ghcr.io/mealie-recipes/mealie:v2.1.0
    container_name: mealie
    #Look up in the Mealie Docs for how to use Mealie
  InstagramToMealie:
    image: jotec2002/instagramtomealie
    ports:
      - 9001:9001
    environment:
      INSTA_USER: "instagram username"
      INSTA_PWD: "Cleartext Instagram password"
      MEALIE_API_KEY: "MEALIE API KEY"
      MEALIE_URL: "YOU LOCAL MEALIE INSTALLATION" # e.g http://mealie:9000
      MEALIE_OPENAI_REQUEST_TIMEOUT: 60           # Optional, default: 60
      MEALIE_USE_INSTAGRAM_TAGS: true
```

```yaml
    container_name: mealie
    #Look up in the Mealie Docs for how to use Mealie

    image: jotec2002/instagramtomealie
    ports:
      - 9001:9001
    environment:
      INSTA_USER: "instagram username"
      INSTA_PWD: "Cleartext Instagram password"
      MEALIE_API_KEY: "MEALIE API KEY"
      MEALIE_URL: "YOU LOCAL MEALIE INSTALLATION" # e.g http://mealie:9000
      MEALIE_OPENAI_REQUEST_TIMEOUT: 60           # Optional, default: 60
      MEALIE_USE_INSTAGRAM_TAGS: true
```

Content:
**Building the Docker image yourself**

Configure just like when using the provided Docker image but replace with the following in `compose.yaml`:
Translation:
**自行构建 Docker 镜像**

配置方法与使用提供的 Docker 镜像时相同，但在 `compose.yaml` 中替换为以下内容：

RowTranslations.originContent: Configure just like when using the provided Docker image but replace with the following in `compose.yaml`:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 配置方法与使用提供的 Docker 镜像时相同，但在 `compose.yaml` 中替换为以下内容：

Content:
```diff
services:
  mealie:
    image: ghcr.io/mealie-recipes/mealie:v2.1.0
    container_name: mealie
    #Look up in the Mealie Docs for how to use Mealie
  InstagramToMealie:
+   build:
+     context: .
+     dockerfile: Dockerfile
+   image: instagramtomealie:latest
    ports:
      - 9001:9001
```
Translation:
```diff
services:
  mealie:
    image: ghcr.io/mealie-recipes/mealie:v2.1.0
    container_name: mealie
    #Look up in the Mealie Docs for how to use Mealie
  InstagramToMealie:
+   build:
+     context: .
+     dockerfile: Dockerfile
+   image: instagramtomealie:latest
    ports:
      - 9001:9001
```

RowTranslations.originContent: #Look up in the Mealie Docs for how to use Mealie
RowTranslations.translatedContent: #Look up in the Mealie Docs for how to use Mealie

Content:
### Usage

1. Open in Webbrowser (e.g. `http://instagramtomealie.my-server.com`) and just import the Instagram URL into the textfield
2. Call from an automation (e.g. IOS shortcut) the url `http://instagramtomealie.my-server.com?url=<InstagramURL>`
3. If you need an API which responds with the result of the import, use `POST http://instagramtomealie.my-server.com/api` sending the URL as either the request's body in JSON format (preferred, `{"url": "<InstagramURL>"}`) or as a query param (see previous bullet point). The API responds a JSON in the format:
Translation:
### 使用方法

1. 在网页浏览器中打开（例如 `http://instagramtomealie.my-server.com`），然后将 Instagram URL 导入文本框中  
2. 从自动化工具调用（例如 iOS 快捷指令）URL `http://instagramtomealie.my-server.com?url=<InstagramURL>`  
3. 如果需要一个返回导入结果的 API，使用 `POST http://instagramtomealie.my-server.com/api`，将 URL 作为请求体中的 JSON 格式发送（推荐，`{"url": "<InstagramURL>"}`）或作为查询参数发送（见上一条）。API 返回的 JSON 格式为：

RowTranslations.originContent: 1. Open in Webbrowser (e.g. `http://instagramtomealie.my-server.com`) and just import the Instagram URL into the textfield
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 1. 在网页浏览器中打开（例如 `http://instagramtomealie.my-server.com`），然后将 Instagram URL 导入文本框中

RowTranslations.originContent: 2. Call from an automation (e.g. IOS shortcut) the url `http://instagramtomealie.my-server.com?url=<InstagramURL>`
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 2. 从自动化工具调用（例如 iOS 快捷指令）URL `http://instagramtomealie.my-server.com?url=<InstagramURL>`

RowTranslations.originContent: 3. If you need an API which responds with the result of the import, use `POST http://instagramtomealie.my-server.com/api` sending the URL as either the request's body in JSON format (preferred, `{"url": "<InstagramURL>"}`) or as a query param (see previous bullet point). The API responds a JSON in the format:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 3. 如果需要一个返回导入结果的 API，使用 `POST http://instagramtomealie.my-server.com/api`，将 URL 作为请求体中的 JSON 格式发送（推荐，`{"url": "<InstagramURL>"}`）或作为查询参数发送（见上一条）。API 返回的 JSON 格式为：

Content:
```json
{
  "recipe_slug": <imported recipe slug>,
  "error": <error message if any error>,
  "url": <Instagram URL which was imported>
}
```
Translation:
```json
{
  "recipe_slug": <imported recipe slug>,
  "error": <error message if any error>,
  "url": <Instagram URL which was imported>
}
```

Content: ### Configuration
Translation: ### 配置

Content:
```env
MEALIE_URL:                          # Full URL of your Mealie instance (e.g http://mealie:9000, http://192.168.1.2:9000, http://my-mealie.com), required.
MEALIE_API_KEY:                      # API key used to authenticate with the Mealie REST API, required.
MEALIE_OPENAI_REQUEST_TIMEOUT: 60    # The timeout in seconds for OpenAI / Ollama requests, optional, default 60.
MEALIE_USE_INSTAGRAM_TAGS: true      # Embeds tags provided on the Instagram post as tags in Mealie, optional, default true.
INSTA_USER:                          # Instagram username (e.g mob_kitchen), required.
INSTA_PWD:                           # Instagram password in plaintext, optional (if using a session file).
INSTA_TOTP_SECRET:                   # Secret key used for 2FA authentication, optional, not recommended.
HTTP_PORT:                           # Port to use for the Flask HTTP server, optional, default 9001
```
Translation:
```env

MEALIE_API_KEY:                      # API key used to authenticate with the Mealie REST API, required.
MEALIE_OPENAI_REQUEST_TIMEOUT: 60    # The timeout in seconds for OpenAI / Ollama requests, optional, default 60.
MEALIE_USE_INSTAGRAM_TAGS: true      # Embeds tags provided on the Instagram post as tags in Mealie, optional, default true.
INSTA_USER:                          # Instagram username (e.g mob_kitchen), required.
INSTA_PWD:                           # Instagram password in plaintext, optional (if using a session file).
INSTA_TOTP_SECRET:                   # Secret key used for 2FA authentication, optional, not recommended.
HTTP_PORT:                           # Port to use for the Flask HTTP server, optional, default 9001
```
